requirement_topic.en: Product Labelling — SDPPI Red-Box Certification Number, IMEI Marking, and Bahasa Indonesia Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 产品标注——SDPPI红框认证编号、IMEI标注及印度尼西亚语文件
requirement_topic.zht: 產品標注——SDPPI紅框認證編號、IMEI標注及印度尼西亞語文件

summary.en: All wireless and telecommunications devices that have obtained SDPPI type approval must display the SDPPI certification number in a red-bordered box on the product body, outer packaging, or label before customs clearance and market entry. The red-box SDPPI number is the primary visual compliance indicator inspected by DJBC (Directorate General of Customs and Excise) at Indonesian ports of entry. The certification number must be permanently affixed or printed; where the device is too small to accommodate the label, the certification number may appear on the outer packaging instead. Cellular and mobile devices must additionally display the IMEI number on the device and outer packaging, consistent with PM Kominfo No. 1 of 2020 on IMEI-based control. Under Indonesian consumer protection law (Undang-Undang No. 8 Tahun 1999 tentang Perlindungan Konsumen) and Ministry of Trade regulations, the product user manual, warranty terms, and key safety warnings must be provided in Bahasa Indonesia for consumer-facing products. Products shipped to Indonesia displaying only Chinese SRRC numbers, EU CE marks, or FCC IDs — without the red-box SDPPI certification number — will be detained at Indonesian customs even if the importer holds a valid SDPPI certificate on file.
summary.zh: 所有已取得SDPPI型号认证的无线及电信设备，须在通关及进入市场前，在产品机体、外包装或标签上以红框形式显示SDPPI认证编号。红框SDPPI编号是DJBC（关税和消费税总局）在印度尼西亚口岸查验的主要视觉合规标识。认证编号须永久贴附或印制；若设备过小无法贴附标签，认证编号可改印于外包装。蜂窝及移动设备还须依据2020年第1号KOMINFO部长令（基于IMEI的管控规定），在设备及外包装上标注IMEI编号。依据印度尼西亚消费者保护法（第8号法律/1999年）及贸易部法规，面向消费者的产品用户手册、保修条款及主要安全警告须以印度尼西亚语（Bahasa Indonesia）提供。仅标有中国SRRC编号、欧盟CE标志或FCC ID——而无红框SDPPI认证编号——的货物在进口时，即便进口商持有有效SDPPI证书，DJBC仍将予以扣押。
summary.zht: 所有已取得SDPPI型號認證的無線及電信設備，須在通關及進入市場前，在產品機體、外包裝或標籤上以紅框形式顯示SDPPI認證編號。紅框SDPPI編號是DJBC（關稅和消費稅總局）在印度尼西亞口岸查驗的主要視覺合規標識。認證編號須永久貼附或印製；若設備過小無法貼附標籤，認證編號可改印於外包裝。蜂窩及移動設備還須依據2020年第1號KOMINFO部長令（基於IMEI的管控規定），在設備及外包裝上標注IMEI編號。依據印度尼西亞消費者保護法（第8號法律/1999年）及貿易部法規，面向消費者的產品用戶手冊、保修條款及主要安全警告須以印度尼西亞語（Bahasa Indonesia）提供。僅標有中國SRRC編號、歐盟CE標誌或FCC ID——而無紅框SDPPI認證編號——的貨物在進口時，即便進口商持有有效SDPPI證書，DJBC仍將予以扣押。

standards_or_laws: Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 16 Tahun 2018 — Article on labelling obligation for certified telecommunications devices (SDPPI certification number in red-bordered box)
Peraturan Menteri Kominfo No. 1 Tahun 2020 — IMEI labelling and registration requirement for cellular and mobile devices
Undang-Undang No. 8 Tahun 1999 tentang Perlindungan Konsumen (Consumer Protection Law — Bahasa Indonesia product documentation requirement)
Peraturan Pemerintah No. 58 Tahun 2001 tentang Pembinaan dan Pengawasan Penyelenggaraan Perlindungan Konsumen (Consumer protection enforcement — labelling and documentation in Bahasa Indonesia)

summary.en: Chinese product labelling for wireless devices in the domestic market includes the SRRC radio type approval number, the CCC mark and certificate number (where applicable), the MIIT NAL (Network Access License) number for terminal equipment connecting to public networks, and required GB-standard safety and EMC symbols. Chinese regulations require that product manuals and safety warnings be provided in Simplified Chinese for the domestic market. None of these Chinese approval marks or labels carry any recognition in Indonesia: the SDPPI red-box certification number is the sole valid compliance marking for the Indonesian market and must be applied — either by re-labelling at the factory or via an Indonesian label supplement — before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备国内市场产品标注包括：SRRC无线电型号核准编号、CCC标志及证书编号（适用情况下）、公共网络接入终端设备的MIIT进网许可证编号，以及GB标准要求的安全和EMC标识。中国法规要求产品手册及安全警告以简体中文提供。上述中国批准标志或标注在印度尼西亚均不具任何认可效力：SDPPI红框认证编号是印度尼西亚市场唯一有效的合规标识，须在发货前——通过工厂再贴标或加贴印度尼西亚标签补充件——加贴到位。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備國內市場產品標注包括：SRRC無線電型號核准編號、CCC標誌及證書編號（適用情況下）、公共網路接入終端設備的MIIT進網許可證編號，以及GB標準要求的安全和EMC標識。中國法規要求產品手冊及安全警告以簡體中文提供。上述中國批准標誌或標注在印度尼西亞均不具任何認可效力：SDPPI紅框認證編號是印度尼西亞市場唯一有效的合規標識，須在發貨前——通過工廠再貼標或加貼印度尼西亞標籤補充件——加貼到位。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval number display — required under MIIT radio management regulations
CCC mark and certificate number — required for CCC-scope products under CNCA regulations
MIIT NAL (Network Access License / 进网许可证) number — required for terminal equipment connecting to public networks
Simplified Chinese user manual and safety warnings — required under PRC Consumer Rights Protection Law (No. 15 of 2013)

gap.en: The SDPPI red-box certification number is a unique Indonesian labelling requirement with no counterpart in Chinese, EU, or US label regulations. For products destined for Indonesia, the SDPPI number must be physically applied to the product and/or outer packaging — either integrated into production labelling or applied via a separate label supplement — before shipping. A Bahasa Indonesia user manual or manual supplement is required under Indonesian consumer protection law; Simplified Chinese or English-only manuals do not satisfy this obligation. IMEI must additionally appear on cellular device labels. Common exporter error: shipping devices with Chinese SRRC or EU CE labels only and expecting Indonesian customs to accept a certificate shown by the importer — DJBC inspects the physical label; absence of the red-box SDPPI number triggers detention regardless of valid certificate documentation.
gap.zh: SDPPI红框认证编号是印度尼西亚独有的标注要求，在中国、欧盟或美国标签法规中均无对应规定。出口至印度尼西亚的产品须在发货前将SDPPI编号实体贴附于产品及/或外包装——可在生产环节整合至标签，或另行加贴补充标签。印度尼西亚消费者保护法要求提供印度尼西亚语用户手册或手册补充件；仅提供简体中文或英文手册不满足该义务。蜂窝设备标签还须标注IMEI编号。常见出口商错误：仅贴附中国SRRC或欧盟CE标签发货，期望进口商出示证书可通过印度尼西亚海关——DJBC检查实物标签；即便持有有效证书文件，标签上缺失红框SDPPI编号仍将触发货物扣押。
gap.zht: SDPPI紅框認證編號是印度尼西亞獨有的標注要求，在中國、歐盟或美國標籤法規中均無對應規定。出口至印度尼西亞的產品須在發貨前將SDPPI編號實體貼附於產品及/或外包裝——可在生產環節整合至標籤，或另行加貼補充標籤。印度尼西亞消費者保護法要求提供印度尼西亞語用戶手冊或手冊補充件；僅提供簡體中文或英文手冊不滿足該義務。蜂窩設備標籤還須標注IMEI編號。常見出口商錯誤：僅貼附中國SRRC或歐盟CE標籤發貨，期望進口商出示證書可通過印度尼西亞海關——DJBC檢查實物標籤；即便持有有效證書文件，標籤上缺失紅框SDPPI編號仍將觸發貨物扣押。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SDPPI certification number in red-bordered box on device and/or outer packaging required before customs clearance; Bahasa Indonesia product documentation required for consumer products; IMEI labelling mandatory for cellular devices
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market — SRRC number, CCC mark (where applicable), and MIIT NAL number displayed per MIIT / CNCA labelling requirements; Simplified Chinese user manual and safety warnings required; none recognised in Indonesia

source.publisher: JDIH KOMINFO — PM Kominfo No. 16 Tahun 2018 (Ketentuan Operasional Sertifikasi Perangkat Telekomunikasi)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The SDPPI certification number displayed in a red-bordered box on the device label and outer packaging is mandatory for Indonesian customs clearance and market compliance. This must be physically applied before shipment — holding an SDPPI certificate on file without the label affixed to the product results in DJBC detention. A Bahasa Indonesia user manual is additionally required for consumer products under Indonesian consumer protection law. IMEI labelling applies to all cellular devices. Chinese SRRC, CCC, or CE marks do not substitute for the red-box SDPPI number on Indonesian-bound products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在设备标签及外包装上以红框形式显示的SDPPI认证编号是印度尼西亚通关及市场合规的强制要求。该标注须在发货前实体贴附——仅持有SDPPI证书而未在产品上贴附标签，将导致DJBC扣押货物。消费类产品还须依据印度尼西亚消费者保护法提供印度尼西亚语用户手册。所有蜂窝设备须标注IMEI。中国SRRC、CCC或CE标志不能替代出口至印度尼西亚产品上的红框SDPPI编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在設備標籤及外包裝上以紅框形式顯示的SDPPI認證編號是印度尼西亞通關及市場合規的強制要求。該標注須在發貨前實體貼附——僅持有SDPPI證書而未在產品上貼附標籤，將導致DJBC扣押貨物。消費類產品還須依據印度尼西亞消費者保護法提供印度尼西亞語用戶手冊。所有蜂窩設備須標注IMEI。中國SRRC、CCC或CE標誌不能替代出口至印度尼西亞產品上的紅框SDPPI編號。
